reviews.comment:
Las 2 ypf.buena atención,enla d villa queres inflar y tdo el Rollo d la app.,háganla practica hay gente MUCHA Q Ni conoce las app,tipo mi.abuelo d 77años.le Rompe mcho mcho Las Pelotas las app,gracias.

(Translated by Google)
Both YPF stations have good service. At the Villa station, if you want to inflate your tires and use the app, make it more practical. There are many people who don't even know about apps, like my 77-year-old grandfather. Apps really annoy him. Thanks.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia Juan, muchas gracias por tu  comentario y calificación, te esperamos nuevamente en YPF ACA Belgrano.

reviews.comment:
Pésima  atención. No solo nos maltrataron a mí y a mí acompañante,  sino que el empleado que nos atendió contaba en voz alta a sus compañeros que festejaron la anécdota, que casi "le daba un bife" a otro  cliente. El descuento no justifica la mala atención,  los socios nos merecemos más.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. Not only were my companion and me mistreated, but the employee who served us was loudly telling his colleagues, who laughed at the incident, that he almost "hit" another customer. The discount doesn't excuse the poor service; members deserve better.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia Virginia, lamentamos mucho la mala experiencia de servicio, te pedimos disculpas, estamos trabajando para revertirlo, te esperamos nuevamente en YPF ACA Belgrano.
